close_reason: Implemented buck2 alias to tk in devenv shell with TURNKEY_NO_ALIAS env var to disable. Added aliasBuck2 option to buck2.nix.
description:
Configure devenv shell to alias buck2 to tk for transparent usage.

In devenv shell entry:
```bash
alias buck2='tk'
```

This way users can continue using `buck2 build` etc. and get automatic sync.

Also provide the `tk` command directly for those who prefer it.

Consider: environment variable to disable alias for debugging
```bash
TURNKEY_NO_ALIAS=1  # Use raw buck2
```
title: Shell integration: buck2 alias to tk
